summary: Iteration 45: Auto-Promote Pipeline verification complete. All 26 backend tests passed. Frontend UI tests passed for admin review dashboard including Auto-Promote panel showing drained lanes (0/0/0) and 65 manual review items.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auto-promote pipeline has been executed. 505 products promoted via 3 lanes (245 safe + 2 family + 258 inherit). 65 remain for manual review. All lanes are now drained (0 auto-promotable). Stats show: 1202 total products, 1134 canonical (94.3% coverage), 66 pending review, 842 promoted. Manual review reasons: conflict_detected(42), very_low_confidence(29), low_confidence(22), weak_evidence(15), conflict_status(12).

admin_login.POST /api/admin/login: PASS - Returns token with correct password

review_stats.GET /api/admin/review/stats: PASS - Returns stats with expected values

review_products.GET /api/admin/review/products?division=: PASS - Returns ENT products with correct brands

catalog_divisions.GET /api/catalog/divisions: PASS - Returns 4 pilot divisions (Trauma, Cardiovascular, Diagnostics, Joint Replacement)

frontend_ui.Review dashboard stats: PASS - Shows 1202 total, 1134 canonical, 66 pending, 842 promoted
frontend_ui.Auto-Promote tab: PASS - Shows 4-lane pipeline with 0/0/0 lanes and 65 manual
